title: Water Order Practice
intendedTensionBeat: The lower puppy is still the priority, but the player must use one route-tax clear before extraction.
intendedReleaseBeat: A clean lower rescue followed by a calm upper rescue reinforces the correct order.
expectedPath: Clear the lower route tax, avoid broad side clears, rescue the lower puppy, then pivot to the upper puppy.
expectedFailMode: Player spends early actions on non-route clears and lets water pressure become tighter than necessary.
designNotes: Practice level should feel like real gameplay, not a diagram. Crate is route tax only.
